title: Ignace Jan Paderewski
content:
When Paderewski is forgot,
    Our children's children, like as not,
    Will worship in the Hall of Fame,
    Some great piano-maker's name.
meaning:
Oliver Herford's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Ignace Jan Paderewski"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
